stonetop.summary: Demon-seeded corpses of loyal Green Lord servants, still guarding the dead city.

system.concept: Demon-seeded corpses of loyal Green Lord servants, still guarding the dead city.
system.description: When the Fae rebelled, some of the Green Lords' mortal servants — ancestors of the Forest Folk — sided with the traitors. But most remained loyal, or at least too afraid of their masters to risk turning. Their loyalty did not save them: the Green Lords planted demon-seeds in fallen servants' bodies, then, seeing how effective the animated corpses were, in the living too. Many of these horrors remain in @UUID[Compendium.stonetop_pwd.stonetop-journal.JournalEntry.76FKkdtTFxWEGIKQ]{Vor Svetelik}, bound by orders to protect the city or certain sites within. Thank the gods they were not allowed to roam free.
